AssumeRole.description: Grants permission to obtain a set of temporary security credentials that you can use to access AWS resources that you might not normally have access to

AssumeRoleWithSAML.description: Grants permission to obtain a set of temporary security credentials for users who have been authenticated via a SAML authentication response

AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity.description: Grants permission to obtain a set of temporary security credentials for users who have been authenticated in a mobile or web application with a web identity provider

AssumeRoot.description: Grants permission to obtain a set of temporary security credentials that you can use to perform privileged tasks in member accounts in your organization

DecodeAuthorizationMessage.description: Grants permission to decode additional information about the authorization status of a request from an encoded message returned in response to an AWS request

GetAccessKeyInfo.description: Grants permission to obtain details about the access key id passed as a parameter to the request

GetCallerIdentity.description: Grants permission to obtain details about the IAM identity whose credentials are used to call the API

GetDelegatedAccessToken.description: Returns temporary security credentials for accessing an AWS account after temporary delegation request approval. This API requires the tradeInToken provided upon request delegation approval and is intended to be used only by Amazon or AWS Partners

GetFederationToken.description: Grants permission to obtain a set of temporary security credentials (consisting of an access key ID, a secret access key, and a security token) for a federated user

GetServiceBearerToken.description: Grants permission to obtain a STS bearer token for an AWS root user, IAM role, or an IAM user

GetSessionToken.description: Grants permission to obtain a set of temporary security credentials (consisting of an access key ID, a secret access key, and a security token) for an AWS account or IAM user

GetWebIdentityToken.description: Grants permission to obtain a short-lived, publicly verifiable JSON Web Token (JWT) that represents the calling IAM principal's identity

SetContext.description: Grants permission to set context keys on a STS session

SetSourceIdentity.description: Grants permission to set a source identity on a STS session

TagGetWebIdentityToken.description: Grants permission to add tags to the JSON Web Token (JWT) generated by the GetWebIdentityToken API

TagSession.description: Grants permission to add tags to a STS session

accounts.google.com:aud.description: Filters access by the Google application ID

accounts.google.com:oaud.description: Filters access by the Google audience

accounts.google.com:sub.description: Filters access by the subject of the claim (the Google user ID)

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:amr.description: Filters access by the login information for Amazon Cognito

cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:aud.description: Filters access by the Amazon Cognito identity pool ID

cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:sub.description: Filters access by the subject of the claim (the Amazon Cognito user ID)

graph.facebook.com:app_id.description: Filters access by the Facebook application ID

graph.facebook.com:id.description: Filters access by the Facebook user ID

iam:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are attached to the role that is being assumed

saml:aud.description: Filters access by the endpoint URL to which SAML assertions are presented

saml:cn.description: Filters access by the eduOrg attribute

saml:commonName.description: Filters access by the commonName attribute

saml:doc.description: Filters access by on the principal that was used to assume the role

saml:eduorghomepageuri.description: Filters access by the eduOrg attribute

saml:eduorgidentityauthnpolicyuri.description: Filters access by the eduOrg attribute

saml:eduorglegalname.description: Filters access by the eduOrg attribute

saml:eduorgsuperioruri.description: Filters access by the eduOrg attribute

saml:eduorgwhitepagesuri.description: Filters access by the eduOrg attribute

saml:edupersonaffiliation.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonassurance.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonentitlement.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonnickname.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonorgdn.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonorgunitdn.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonprimaryaffiliation.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonprimaryorgunitdn.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonprincipalname.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersonscopedaffiliation.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:edupersontargetedid.description: Filters access by the eduPerson attribute

saml:givenName.description: Filters access by the givenName attribute

saml:iss.description: Filters access by on the issuer, which is represented by a URN

saml:mail.description: Filters access by the mail attribute

saml:name.description: Filters access by the name attribute

saml:namequalifier.description: Filters access by the hash value of the issuer, account ID, and friendly name

saml:organizationStatus.description: Filters access by the organizationStatus attribute

saml:primaryGroupSID.description: Filters access by the primaryGroupSID attribute

saml:sub.description: Filters access by the subject of the claim (the SAML user ID)

saml:sub_type.description: Filters access by the value persistent, transient, or the full Format URI

saml:surname.description: Filters access by the surname attribute

saml:uid.description: Filters access by the uid attribute

saml:x500UniqueIdentifier.description: Filters access by the uid attribute

sts:AWSServiceName.description: Filters access by the service that is obtaining a bearer token

sts:DurationSeconds.description: Filters access by the duration in seconds when getting a bearer token or a JSON Web Token (JWT) from the GetWebIdentityToken API

sts:ExternalId.description: Filters access by the unique identifier required when you assume a role in another account

sts:IdentityTokenAudience.description: Filters access by the audience that is passed in the request

sts:RequestContext/${ContextKey}.description: Filters access by the session context key-value pairs embedded in the signed context assertion retrieved from a trusted context provider

sts:RequestContextProviders.description: Filters access by the context provider ARNs

sts:RoleSessionName.description: Filters access by the role session name required when you assume a role

sts:SigningAlgorithm.description: Filters access by the signing algorithm that is passed in the request

sts:SourceIdentity.description: Filters access by the source identity that is passed in the request

sts:TransitiveTagKeys.description: Filters access by the transitive tag keys that are passed in the request

www.amazon.com:app_id.description: Filters access by the Login with Amazon application ID

www.amazon.com:user_id.description: Filters access by the Login with Amazon user ID
